<HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>: todayRevenue >= <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>,
      // New analytics metrics
      todayOrderCount: <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>.length,
      monthlyOrderCount: monthlyAll,
      wechatAddRate,
      conversionRate,
      renewRate,
      repurchaseRate,
      todayBudanCount: <HIGH_ENTROPY_REDACTED>.filter(o => (o.customFields?.deltaNote || o.notes || '').includes('补单')).length,
      currentStatus: companion?.status ?? 'OFFLINE',
      splitMode,
      tierInfo,
      statusDurations: {
        entertainment: formatDuration(durations.entertainment),
        work: formatDuration(durations.work),
